tools.name: Intelligence Pack Receipt Gate
tools.purpose_ru: Проверяет sidecar receipt Intelligence Pack: FINAL_SHA256SUMS, MACHINE_RECEIPT, sidecar manifest и отсутствие self-referential hash в ZIP manifest.
tools.purpose_en: Validates Intelligence Pack sidecar receipt: FINAL_SHA256SUMS, MACHINE_RECEIPT, sidecar manifest, and no self-referential hash in ZIP manifest.
tools.validation_recipe: Run on a generated Intelligence Pack ZIP; expect PASS_INTELLIGENCE_PACK_RECEIPT.
